texto: Everything in life is one way or another created by thoughts, ideas. The thoughts can be chaotic and wild and create a lot of pain and trouble, or they can be organized to the last minute detail and make something beautiful and perfect. Your life has its structure. It is composed of things that are happening in it. All those events are reflections of your intentions. Things and occurrences are shaped according to your thoughts. Is there some confusion in your life? There is likely confusion in your mind. Are you experiencing joy, peace and beauty? Well, then the same are your wishes.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Daniel Stangar que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Everything in life is one way or another created by thoughts, ideas. The thoughts can be chaotic …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, inspiracional, paranormal, com foco em inspiracao e paranormal.
